acceptance_criteria.text: Telegram owner-bot `client_today` callback and free-text today intent use the shared Sprint 1 Operator attention core.
proof: build_today_text now calls build_attention_brief and formats its response for Telegram.
src/telegram_bot.py already routes client_today callbacks and today intents through build_today_text.

acceptance_criteria.text: Telegram output clearly states cached-data mode, no paid actions executed, and manual publication boundary for map replies.
proof: src/services/telegram_dashboard.py formats LocalOS Operator output with saved-data wording.
The formatter says paid actions were not executed and fresh map data requires separate paid update consent.
The formatter says map reply publication remains manual copy/paste.

acceptance_criteria.text: Client intent classifier recognizes `Что требует моего внимания сегодня?` as the today/attention intent.
proof: src/services/telegram_response_router.py adds `что требует внимания` and `требует моего внимания` patterns.
tests/test_telegram_dashboard_copy.py verifies the phrase maps to `today`.

acceptance_criteria.text: No paid refresh, AI generation, external provider write, schema migration, production data change, commit, push, or deploy is performed.
proof: The implementation only changes Telegram formatting/routing, docs, tests, and proof artifacts.
No deploy, commit, or push commands were run for Sprint 2.

acceptance_criteria.text: Operator documentation records Sprint 2 Telegram transport coverage without implying full freeform chat, public MCP, or provider write support.
proof: docs/agents/localos-operator.md documents the Telegram owner-bot route and Sprint 2 transport-specific formatter.
docs/agents/index.md states web and Telegram use cached data only and do not run paid refreshes, AI generation, external writes, or publication.

acceptance_criteria.text: Proof-loop evidence records changed files and validation checks.
proof: This evidence file lists changed files and fresh verifier commands.

commands_for_fresh_verifier: rg -n "LocalOS Operator|client_today|Что требует моего внимания|paid refresh|Платные действия не выполнялись|Публикация ответов в карты|provider write|MCP" src/services/telegram_dashboard.py src/services/telegram_response_router.py src/telegram_bot.py docs/agents .agent/tasks/operator-sprint2-telegram-attention-20260520/spec.md tests/test_telegram_dashboard_copy.py
known_gaps: Sprint 2 does not implement freeform LLM Operator chat.
Sprint 2 does not implement paid refresh consent storage or charging.
Sprint 2 does not implement provider writes or map publication.
